results.title: The Heat boils away after one series
results.description: ITV has ‘no current plans’ to return to Twofour’s Olivia Attwood-fronted format

results.title: Morrisons shoppers sprint to store after learning 'dangerous' snack is part of meal deal
results.description: Morrisons shoppers are racing to their local stores after learning a surprising snack is part of the meal deal - as some say it's 'dangerous' for their waistline
